overallSummary: Fabio Giglietto maintains an active presence on Mastodon, LinkedIn, and Bluesky, focusing on topics related to computational social science, disinformation, and research opportunities. LinkedIn attracts the largest audience, while Bluesky shows strong engagement rates, particularly on research-related announcements.

contentThemes.description: Posts related to research papers, grants, and methodologies in computational social science.
Content focused on detecting and analyzing disinformation campaigns and coordinated inauthentic behavior.
Posts advertising research positions, PhD opportunities, and calls for collaboration.

recommendations: Diversify content formats (e.g., videos, infographics) to increase engagement.
Tailor content more specifically to each platform's audience and culture.
Increase posting frequency on Mastodon to boost visibility.

platformInsights.bluesky: Bluesky shows a strong interest in academic publications and research opportunities. Reposts are a significant driver of engagement. Continue sharing research-related news and opportunities.
platformInsights.mastodon: Mastodon engagement is lower compared to other platforms. Consider sharing more visually appealing content or participating in relevant community discussions.
platformInsights.linkedin: LinkedIn audience is responsive to announcements about grants and hiring. Continue posting professional updates and job opportunities.

topPerformingContent.content: Excited to announce that our research team has been awarded a new grant to study information operations across social media platforms.
Just published our new paper on coordinated inauthentic behavior on social media platforms!
New research opportunity for PhD students interested in computational social science. Reply for details!
